key.name: output-directory
key.description: Where ripped audio files are written. When empty, the app uses the XDG Music folder (typically ~/Music).

key.name: artwork-source-itunes
key.summary: Use Apple Music / iTunes for cover art

key.name: artwork-source-caa
key.summary: Use Cover Art Archive (MusicBrainz) for cover art

key.name: artwork-max-size
key.description: Full-resolution art is always downloaded for preview. Before embedding into audio files, images are scaled so the longest edge is this many pixels. 0 keeps the original downloaded size. Default is 600.

key.name: use-freedb
key.summary: Look up metadata on FreeDB-compatible services (gnudb)

key.name: auto-lookup-metadata
key.summary: Automatically look up metadata when a disc is detected

key.name: album-folder-template
key.summary: Album folder template under the output directory
key.description: Placeholders: {album_artist}, {album}, {year}, {disc}, {totaldiscs}, {disc_folder} (CD1/CD2 only when total discs > 1; empty otherwise).

key.name: verify-accuraterip
key.description: After extraction, compare track CRCs to the AccurateRip database.

key.name: drive-sample-offset
key.description: AccurateRip sample offset for this drive. Set automatically by Drive setup, or manually from accuraterip.com/driveoffsets.htm.

key.name: drive-offset-configured
key.description: True after the user finishes or skips drive offset calibration.

key.name: drive-offset-device
key.summary: Device path used when the offset was calibrated

key.name: burst-fallback
key.summary: Burst mode fallback for scratched discs
key.description: If secure cdparanoia extraction fails or produces incomplete audio (common on badly scratched discs), automatically re-rip that track with paranoia disabled (burst mode).

key.name: write-rip-log
key.description: After extraction, write an EAC-style status log into the album folder (TOC, CRC, AccurateRip, burst mode, encoder settings).

key.name: test-and-copy
key.description: Extract every track twice (test then copy), compare CRC32 values, and only accept a match. Matches whipper / cyanrip / EAC secure workflow.

key.name: defeat-audio-cache
key.summary: Defeat audio cache between test and copy
key.description: Between the test and copy passes, force a read of a distant sector range so the drive cannot serve the second pass from cache. When drive setup detected caching, this is forced on.

key.name: drive-cache-configured
key.description: True after Drive setup has probed whether this drive caches audio.

key.name: drive-caches-audio
key.description: Result of cache analysis from Drive setup. When true, rips always defeat the audio cache between test and copy.

key.name: drive-accurate-stream
key.description: True when re-reads of the same sector range match after seeking away (EAC Accurate Stream test, measured during Drive setup).

key.name: drive-c2-pointers
key.description: True when MMC CD Read Feature reports C2 Error pointers (via cd-drive).

key.name: rip-htoa
key.summary: Detect and rip Hidden Track One Audio
key.description: If track 1 has a pregap, extract it and save as track 00 when the audio is not digitally silent (HTOA).

key.name: auto-rip
key.summary: Automatically start ripping when a disc is inserted
key.description: When enabled, ready2rip starts a full-disc rip shortly after a new audio CD is detected (tray closed, media ready).

key.name: auto-eject
key.summary: Eject the disc after a successful rip
key.description: When enabled, open the drive tray after a rip finishes successfully.
